name: Classic Pairs Trading (Cointegration-Based)
description: Identify two historically cointegrated assets (e.g. Coca-Cola / PepsiCo). Model their log-price spread as a stationary process using Engle-Granger or Johansen cointegration test. Trade the spread: buy the cheap leg, sell the expensive leg when divergence exceeds 2 standard deviations.
core_logic: Spread = log(P_A) - hedge_ratio * log(P_B). Z-score = (spread - mu) / sigma. BUY when z < -2, SELL when z > +2, EXIT at |z| < 0.5.
pros: Profits in bull and bear markets
signal_buy: Z-score < -2.0 (spread too low → long A, short B)
signal_sell: Z-score > +2.0 (spread too high → short A, long B)
